blockers: No versioned redacted six-plane snapshot contract exists.
No session-scoped effective provider/model read contract with override provenance exists.
Existing mutation routes lack stale-state compare-and-swap, idempotency receipts, and outcome_unknown semantics.
Desktop Management requires an ephemeral credential and is not approved as Cabinet's durable authority.
Provider account status is not guaranteed to be pure or sufficiently redacted for Cabinet.
recommendation: Upstream a durable redacted snapshot and governed prepare/commit/readback contract before implementing a live Cabinet adapter.
